# Rules

The full rule catalogue shipped in `hardened`. Every rule is deterministic — the same input always produces the same finding set — and documented with a machine-readable description, severity, and auto-fix status.

## Summary

### `risk`

Production reliability risks — missing timeouts, missing AbortSignals, unhandled rejections, etc.

| Rule | Severity | Auto-fix |
| --- | --- | :-: |
| [`risk/await-in-loop`](#risk-await-in-loop) | 🟡 `warning` | no |
| [`risk/db-no-query-timeout`](#risk-db-no-query-timeout) | 🔴 `error` | yes |
| [`risk/fetch-no-abort-signal`](#risk-fetch-no-abort-signal) | 🟡 `warning` | no |
| [`risk/floating-promise`](#risk-floating-promise) | 🟡 `warning` | no |
| [`risk/http-no-timeout`](#risk-http-no-timeout) | 🔴 `error` | yes |
| [`risk/prisma-no-timeout`](#risk-prisma-no-timeout) | 🔴 `error` | yes |
| [`risk/promise-all-no-settled`](#risk-promise-all-no-settled) | 🔵 `info` | no |

## Details

### `risk/await-in-loop`

**Category:** `risk` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Severity:** 🟡 `warning` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Auto-fix:** no (finding-only)

`await` inside a loop runs iterations sequentially. Either use `Promise.all` for parallelism or silence with an ignore directive if the sequencing is intentional.

[Full rule docs →](errors/risk-await-in-loop.md)

_To silence this rule on a single call, put `// hardened-ignore-next-line` before the next non-comment, non-blank line._

### `risk/db-no-query-timeout`

**Category:** `risk` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Severity:** 🔴 `error` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Auto-fix:** yes

Database queries without a timeout can hang indefinitely, pinning connections and exhausting pools.

[Full rule docs →](errors/risk-db-no-query-timeout.md)

_To silence this rule on a single call, put `// hardened-ignore-next-line` before the next non-comment, non-blank line._

### `risk/fetch-no-abort-signal`

**Category:** `risk` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Severity:** 🟡 `warning` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Auto-fix:** no (finding-only)

fetch() calls without an AbortSignal can outlive component unmounts or request deadlines.

[Full rule docs →](errors/risk-fetch-no-abort-signal.md)

_To silence this rule on a single call, put `// hardened-ignore-next-line` before the next non-comment, non-blank line._

### `risk/floating-promise`

**Category:** `risk` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Severity:** 🟡 `warning` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Auto-fix:** no (finding-only)

Unhandled promises silently swallow errors and mask production failures.

[Full rule docs →](errors/risk-floating-promise.md)

_To silence this rule on a single call, put `// hardened-ignore-next-line` before the next non-comment, non-blank line._

### `risk/http-no-timeout`

**Category:** `risk` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Severity:** 🔴 `error` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Auto-fix:** yes

HTTP calls without a timeout can hang indefinitely under network partition.

[Full rule docs →](errors/risk-http-no-timeout.md)

_To silence this rule on a single call, put `// hardened-ignore-next-line` before the next non-comment, non-blank line._

### `risk/prisma-no-timeout`

**Category:** `risk` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Severity:** 🔴 `error` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Auto-fix:** yes

Prisma operations without a timeout can block a connection indefinitely.

[Full rule docs →](errors/risk-prisma-no-timeout.md)

_To silence this rule on a single call, put `// hardened-ignore-next-line` before the next non-comment, non-blank line._

### `risk/promise-all-no-settled`

**Category:** `risk` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Severity:** 🔵 `info` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Auto-fix:** no (finding-only)

Fire-and-forget Promise.all rejects on first failure. Use Promise.allSettled when every outcome should remain visible.

[Full rule docs →](errors/risk-promise-all-no-settled.md)

_To silence this rule on a single call, put `// hardened-ignore-next-line` before the next non-comment, non-blank line._

---

This file is generated from `packages/rules-risk/src/*.ts` metadata. To add or modify a rule, edit the rule's source file — the `id`, `category`, `severity`, and `description` fields drive this catalogue. Then run `pnpm docs:rules`.
